revision.comment: comma
1 revision imported: importing wikipedia
Adding [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia0]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]] to [[Category:Articles tagged as templates and modules]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:All articles containing potentially dated statements]] to [[Category:Pages from wikipedia]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Pages from wikipedia]] to [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia22]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia0]] to [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia40]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia22]] to [[Category:dd]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

Copying from [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia22]] to [[Category:dd]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia40]] to [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia04]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
deprecating hotcat stuff in favorr of mass replace regex
Moving from [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia22]] to [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia06]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
removed [[Category:Dd]]; added [[Category:Ddpages to]] using [[Help:Gadget-HotCat|HotCat]]
removed [[Category:Ddpages to]]; added [[Category:Pages to be redireccted]] using [[Help:Gadget-HotCat|HotCat]]
Adding [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects 2]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
finally breaking the redirects for category:hh (the third one)
Copying from [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects to break]] to [[Category:kkk]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:bbb]] adding a dummy category again to make the cateroies show up using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects to break]] to [[Category:Pages with redlinks to fill]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
adding to this necessary category
Removing from [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects 2]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
adding a proper enwiki link
Moving from [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects to break]] to [[Category:unlisted stubs]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia]] doing this to split off the two wikipedia derived categories using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Pages with redlinks to fill]] to [[Category:kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Pages with redlinks to fill]] to [[Category:original pages]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Pages to be redireccted]] to [[Category:Pages to be redirected]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
